name: Fried Egg
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour milk into a jar.
2. Add 2 tbsp buttermilk to the milk.
3. Stir well and set aside for 24 hours. It will thicken.
4. To make dessert, place a couple of spoonfuls onto a plate and flatten slightly.
5. Place a peach half on top of this, hence the name "fried egg."
